daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Launches and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: Falcon Heavy | ViaSat-3 F3 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon Heavy is set to launch the ViaSat-3 F3 satellite, providing significant advancements in satellite broadband capabilities.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for spectacular views.

top_events.title: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight
top_events.description: The Soyuz-5 rocket is scheduled for a demonstration flight, marking a significant step in Russian launch capabilities.

top_events.title: Aurora Opportunity
top_events.description: A possible aurora event with a Kp index of 4 is predicted, offering viewing opportunities at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check weather conditions and head to dark locations.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
